title: Advanced Algorithm Engineering Capstone · Cost-Model Clinic: Failure Operations
summary: Build and defend a planning engine across graph, optimization, and uncertain-load requirements. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 failure operations increment in an advanced algorithm system with proof and operations packet. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design timeout, partial-result, retry, and diagnostic behavior without corrupting claims.
Enforce time, memory, recursion, and output budgets under adversarial scale.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
